title: Tunisian Crisp Fish
description: A flavorful and crispy fish dish inspired by Tunisian cuisine.

ingredients.name: Tunisian Spice Blend
ingredients.notes: Or make your own with cumin, coriander, and chili flakes

instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Season the fish fillets with salt and Tunisian spice blend.
Dip each fillet in the lemon juice, then coat with crisp.
Place the coated fish on the prepared baking sheet.
Drizzle with olive oil and bake for 12-15 minutes or until cooked through.
